name: TitleMax Title Pawns
description_short: Decatur, GA's TitleMax Title Pawns location at 3665 Flat Shoals Rd offers quick title pawn services with extended weekday and Saturday hours.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Pawns' Decatur location is situated at 3665 Flat Shoals Rd Suite B in Decatur, GA, offering convenient access for residents in the area. This standalone storefront is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, Saturday from 10 AM to 4 PM, and closed on Sundays, making it accessible for both morning and evening visits.

At this Decatur storefront, customers can access title pawn services with competitive terms and quick funding. Contact the location directly at 404-243-7345 to discuss your title pawn needs and learn about the process for getting fast cash against your vehicle's title.

If you're a Decatur resident seeking a title pawn, bring your vehicle title, government-issued ID, and proof of address to speed up the transaction. TitleMax provides fast, accessible lending when you need it most.
address: 3665 Flat Shoals Rd Suite B, Decatur, GA 30034

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee offered. Early payoff options exist but no guarantee policy was found.

pros: No credit check required — vehicle value alone determines loan eligibility
Same-day cash disbursement in as little as 30 minutes at a store location
Borrower keeps and drives their vehicle throughout the entire loan term
No bank account required to qualify or receive funds
900+ physical store locations across 14 states for in-person access
Founded in 1998 with 25+ years of title lending operations
Personal loans up to $2,500 available in select states without vehicle collateral
cons: APR ranges from 119% to 300% depending on state — among the highest legally permitted in consumer lending
CFPB enforcement action in 2023 against parent TMX Finance LLC for Military Lending Act violations targeting active-duty servicemembers
30-day renewable loan terms are frequently rolled over, creating documented multi-month debt cycles with real risk of vehicle repossession
Not BBB accredited; multiple BBB profiles across locations reflect significant consumer complaint volumes
No longer originating new loans in California, Illinois, New Mexico, or Virginia due to regulatory pressure
best_for: Vehicle owners with poor or no credit history facing a genuine cash emergency
Consumers who have been declined by banks, credit unions, and personal loan lenders
People who own their car or truck free and clear (no existing lien) and need up to $10,000 quickly
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for vehicle-owning consumers with poor or no credit who face a genuine emergency and have exhausted conventional borrowing options. It provides fast, no-credit-check access to up to $10,000 secured by a vehicle title, with cash available in-store the same day. The central caveat is cost and risk: APRs between 119% and 300%, combined with 30-day rollover terms, make this one of the most expensive forms of consumer borrowing available, and vehicle repossession is a documented outcome for borrowers who cannot repay.
services: Car title pawns (Georgia and select states — legally distinct from loans under state pawn law)
Car title loans (secured by car or truck title)
Personal loans up to $2,500 (select states, no vehicle required)
Online loan application initiation via titlemax.com
Online customer portal for balance checks, payment history, and due dates
iOS mobile app for account management and store locating
In-store vehicle value appraisal to determine loan eligibility
meta_description: Decatur, GA's TitleMax Title Pawns at 3665 Flat Shoals Rd. Quick title pawns and fast funding for Decatur residents.
